title: dactylorhiza praetermissa var. junialis
intro: Dactylorhiza praetermissa var. junialis, also known as the Juniper-leaved Spotted Orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the United Kingdom. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza praetermissa var. junialis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use is not widely recommended due to its rarity and potential side effects.
